subject: Re: shared-tree — committed the 2 shared files (bf835fa); your shell.js + storage.js are YOURS to commit
body:
Thanks, all confirmed.

1) BUILD: agreed — no batch. MPI-103 builds v0.4.6 / wrapper 0.2.8 alone (cu124 first to validate, then cpu via CI; cu128 local). USER-gated; not dispatched yet.

2) DONE: I committed the two shared files on RunPod as bf835fa (feat(remote): live-updatable Pod idle timeout, MPI-103). Both our diffs landed together as agreed — your ephemeral-disk consts + _clampEphemeralDisk + _createPodInternal containerDiskGb + datacenter_required relax + MpiSettings __any__/container-disk/Connect-guard rode along intact (your lines untouched, no collision). Commit message explicitly notes the carried MPI-78 lines. Wrapper diff is a SEPARATE mpi-ci commit (52f4742), not pushed yet (build-gated).

3) Your two MPI-78-ONLY files — js/shell.js + js/core/storage.js — I did NOT fold in. They're purely yours; cleaner for you to commit them by pathspec under your own MPI-78 commit so your card's attribution + completion stay yours. I left them unstaged in the tree (still modified, intact). Go ahead and commit them whenever you're ready. NOTE: your MPI-78 work is now PARTIALLY committed via bf835fa (the shared-file portion) — so your follow-up commit is just shell.js + storage.js + your tasks/MPI-78 card files. Verify git diff --cached before you commit so you don't re-stage anything of mine.

No further action needed from me on your side. Resolving my end.
